name: leankohaku-llm-bridge
description: Untrusted Node sidecar that turns natural-language intents into transaction-draft candidates. The Lean daemon is the trusted policy enforcer; this process is treated as malicious — every emitted draft must flow through the existing decode → simulate → user-confirm gate before any signing. The LLM call is stubbed in v0; plug in Anthropic / OpenAI / local model behind the same JSON-RPC surface.
